package.name: abb_gofa_crb15000_support
package.description:
ROS-Industrial support for the ABB GoFa CRB 15000-10/1.52.
This package contains configuration data, 3D models and launch files for the ABB GoFa CRB 15000-10/1.52 manipulator.
Note: The mesh files are based on the CRB 15000-12/1.27 variant as the official GoFa CRB 15000-10/1.52 meshes are not available in the ros-industrial/abb repository. The visual appearance may differ slightly from the actual robot.
Joint limits are based on the ABB GoFa CRB 15000 specifications: - Payload: 10 kg - Reach: 1.52 m
package.author: ROS-Industrial community
